issues: [Cognitive Load] TrustBar.tsx: Form inputs without labels. Use <label> for accessibility and clarity.
warnings: [Reflective] TrustBar.tsx: Long-form content without brand story/values. Add 'About' or 'Why We Exist' section.
[Typography] TrustBar.tsx: No line length constraint (45-75ch). Use max-w-prose or max-w-[65ch].
[Typography] TrustBar.tsx: Fixed font sizes without clamp(). Consider fluid typography: clamp(MIN, PREFERRED, MAX)
[Typography] TrustBar.tsx: No h1 found. Each page should have one primary heading.
[Visual] TrustBar.tsx: Flat design with no depth. Consider shadows or subtle gradients for hierarchy.
[Color] TrustBar.tsx: Possible low-contrast combination detected. Verify WCAG AA (4.5:1 for text).
